metadata.description: A single-plugin marketplace for Headache Helper — grounded-only headache/migraine Q&A from a curated, peer-reviewed wiki.

plugins.name: headache-helper
plugins.description: Answer headache/migraine questions strictly from a curated local wiki of peer-reviewed sources, with citations, recency-wins-within-tier conflict resolution, and no fabrication. Includes a fetch-and-approve ingest workflow.
